series_metadata.series_title: Maintenance Agreement Reference Files to Operate Software and Hardware
series_metadata.series_description: The Maintenance Agreement Reference Files to Operate Software and Hardware contain information on data processing equipment, software, and other products and their vendors, including but not limited to site keys, certificates and passports, and renewal period dates for products, and other working papers.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Electronic: audited by Auditor of State, audit report is released, all discrepancies are resolved, and
